title: Write ferrum_extlib_draw_wayland.md
description: CCSP lib_ccsp_draw_wayland: primary Linux desktop display backend via libwayland-client. Not in Ferrum stdlib. Design extlib module: xdg-shell window management, xdg-decoration server-side decorations, wl_shm software path, wl_dmabuf GPU zero-copy, high-DPI via wp-fractional-scale-v1, wl_seat input, zwp-text-input-v3 IME, wlr-layer-shell panels, EGL/Vulkan GPU path.
